products.name: Aceto Balsamico Tradizionale di Modena DOP
pros: Authentic traditional production from selected grape varieties
Long aging process that enhances flavor complexity

products.name: Aceto Balsamico Tradizionale di Reggio Emilia DOP

trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s 2025 article highlights the two DOP varieties as the most authentic and traditionally aged balsamic vinegars, providing clear guidance on choosing the best product.
